settings.custom_liquid: THE LEGACY COLLECTION.

<script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/alpinejs@3.x.x/dist/cdn.min.js" defer></script>

<style>
  .lgcy-description-wrapper {
    display: none;
  }

  @media screen and (max-width: 749px) {
    .lgcy-description-wrapper {
      display: block;
    }

    .lgcy-description-full {
      display: none;
    }

    .lgcy-read-btn {
      background: none;
      border: none;
      padding: 0;
      cursor: pointer;
      font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif;
      font-size: 13px;
      font-weight: 400;
      letter-spacing: 0.04em;
      text-decoration: underline;
      text-underline-offset: 3px;
      color: #111;
      margin-top: 4px;
      display: inline-block;
    }
  }
</style>

<script>
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function () {
  if (window.innerWidth >= 750) return;

  const desc = document.querySelector('.collection-hero__description');
  if (!desc) return;

  const fullHTML = desc.innerHTML;

  desc.innerHTML = '';

  // Truncated preview wrapper
  const preview = document.createElement('div');
  preview.className = 'lgcy-description-preview';
  preview.innerHTML = fullHTML;
  preview.style.cssText = 'overflow:hidden; display:-webkit-box; -webkit-line-clamp:2; -webkit-box-orient:vertical;';

  // Full text wrapper
  const full = document.createElement('div');
  full.className = 'lgcy-description-full';
  full.innerHTML = fullHTML;
  full.style.display = 'none';

  // Read more button
  const btn = document.createElement('button');
  btn.className = 'lgcy-read-btn';
  btn.textContent = 'read more';

  let expanded = false;
  btn.addEventListener('click', function () {
    expanded = !expanded;
    if (expanded) {
      preview.style.display = 'none';
      full.style.display = 'block';
      btn.textContent = 'read less';
    } else {
      preview.style.display = '-webkit-box';
      full.style.display = 'none';
      btn.textContent = 'read more';
    }
  });

  desc.appendChild(preview);
  desc.appendChild(full);
  desc.appendChild(btn);
});
</script>

settings.question: How long does shipping take?
settings.answer:
Our orders are typically processed within 1–3 business days.

Estimated Shipping Times:

United States & Canada: 7–12 business days

Europe: 7–12 business days

UAE & Middle East: 10–14 business days

Rest of the World: 7–12 business days

settings.question: What does the warranty include?
settings.answer: Our warranty does not cover damage caused by personal misuse or destruction, and applies only to defects resulting from manufacturing errors or material faults.

settings.question: Any question?
settings.answer: You can reach us through our contact page. We will be happy to assist you.
